mapper.sql: id, activity_id, user_id, registration_time, attendance_status, check_in_time, check_out_time, rating, feedback, special_needs, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, notes, create_time, update_time
mapper.delete:
delete from activity_participant where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
update activity_participant
attendance_status = #{attendanceStatus},
check_in_time = #{checkinTime},
check_out_time = #{checkoutTime},
rating = #{rating},
feedback = #{feedback},
special_needs = #{specialNeeds},
emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact},
emergency_phone = #{emergencyPhone},
notes = #{notes},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ap.id, ap.activity_id, ap.user_id, ap.registration_time, ap.attendance_status, ap.check_in_time, ap.check_out_time, ap.rating, ap.feedback, ap.special_needs, ap.emergency_contact, ap.emergency_phone, ap.notes, ap.create_time, ap.update_time, a.title as activity_title, a.activity_date, a.location as activity_location, a.category_id, a.status as activity_status, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.cost, ac.name as category_name, ac.color as category_color from activity_participant ap left join activity a on ap.activity_id = a.id left join activity_category ac on a.category_id = ac.id where ap.user_id = #{userId} order by ap.registration_time desc

select ap.id, ap.activity_id, ap.user_id, ap.registration_time, ap.attendance_status, ap.check_in_time, ap.check_out_time, ap.rating, ap.feedback, ap.special_needs, ap.emergency_contact, ap.emergency_phone, ap.notes, ap.create_time, ap.update_time, u.name as user_name from activity_participant ap left join user u on ap.user_id = u.id where ap.activity_id = #{activityId} order by ap.registration_time desc
select count(*) from activity_participant where activity_id = #{activityId}
